UI.OptionsForm.Info.Text.Source:
Here you can specify the output filename format for each kind of track.
Pressing the "Add..." button you will see the list with the available placeholders and select them.
Pressing the "Default" button you will reset the output filename format to its default value.
UI.OptionsForm.Info.Text.Translation:
Here you can specify the output filename format for each kind of track.
Pressing the "Add..." button you will see the list with the available placeholders and select them.
Pressing the "Default" button you will reset the output filename format to its default value.

UI.MainForm2.Tooltips.InputFiles.Source:
Contains the list of opened files with their tracks.
You can check the individual tracks in order to select them for extracting.

Note: There is a context menu (right-click on the list) that contains many options for batch selecting tracks.
UI.MainForm2.Tooltips.InputFiles.Translation:
Contains the list of opened files with their tracks.
You can check the individual tracks in order to select them for extracting.

Note: There is a context menu (right-click on the list) that contains many options for batch selecting tracks.
UI.MainForm2.Tooltips.InputFiles.Notes: Tooltip for the input files tree and group

UI.MainForm2.Tooltips.AppendOnDragAndDro.Source:
Check if you want to append files in the input list on drag and drop.
Uncheck if you want to reset the input list every time you drag and drop a new file.
UI.MainForm2.Tooltips.AppendOnDragAndDro.Translation:
Check if you want to append files in the input list on drag and drop.
Uncheck if you want to reset the input list every time you drag and drop a new file.

UI.MainForm2.Tooltips.OverwriteExistingF.Source:
Check if you want the output files to always overwrite existing files with the same filename.
Uncheck if you want the output files to automatically be renamed with a different filename to avoid overwriting existing files.
UI.MainForm2.Tooltips.OverwriteExistingF.Translation:
Check if you want the output files to always overwrite existing files with the same filename.
